div.t-attf-class: col-12 col-md-8 #{'p-4' if not website else ''}

div.p: Appointment failed! The selected timeslot is not available anymore. Someone has booked the same time slot a few seconds before you.
Appointment failed! The selected timeslot is not available. It appears you already have another meeting with us at that date.

div.div: Appointment cancelled! You can now choose a different schedule that suits you better.

We will book you with
as you are already in touch with them.

t.t-value: not appointment_type.resource_ids if not based_on_users else 1

div.t-if: (not based_on_users and no_resources) or (based_on_users and no_users) or no_slots

t.t: This appointment type has no availabilities because it has no staff assigned and does not have any opening hours configured
This appointment type has no availabilities because it has no staff assigned
This appointment type has no availabilities because it does not have any opening hours configured
This appointment type has no availabilities because it has no resource assigned and does not have any opening hours configured
This appointment type has no availabilities because it has no resource assigned
This appointment type has no availabilities because it does not have any opening hours configured

div.t-attf-class: o_appointment_timezone_selection #{'d-none' if month_first_available is False or not appointment_type.active else ''}
o_appointment_calendar_form o_not_editable #{'d-none' if month_first_available is False or not appointment_type.active else 'col-12 col-xl-4'}

div.class: o_appointment_slot_list_loading d-flex align-items-center py-5 my-5 d-none

i.class: fa fa-2x fa-circle-o-notch fa-spin mx-auto text-o-color-2

div.t: DROP BUILDING BLOCKS HERE TO MAKE THEM AVAILABLE ACROSS ALL APPOINTMENTS

div.t-attf-class: o_appointment_intro border-top pt-4 mt-4 #{'d-none' if not appointment_type.active or is_html_empty(appointment_type.message_intro) else ''}

i.class: fa fa-facebook rounded-circle rounded shadow-sm o_editable_media
fa fa-twitter rounded-circle rounded shadow-sm o_editable_media
fa fa-linkedin rounded-circle rounded shadow-sm o_editable_media

div.p: 250 Executive Park Blvd, Suite 3400 • San Francisco CA 94134 • United States

t.t-value: { 'email_to': res_company.email, 'name': request.params.get('name', ''), 'phone': request.params.get('phone', ''), 'email_from': request.params.get('email_from', ''), 'company': request.params.get('company', ''), 'subject': request.params.get('subject', ''), }

section.class: s_title parallax s_parallax_is_fixed bg-black-50 pt24 pb24 o_colored_level

div.p:
Contact us about anything related to our company or services.
We'll do our best to get back to you as soon as possible.

div.class: mb-0 py-2 col-12 s_website_form_submit s_website_form_no_submit_label text-end

section.t-cache: (event, event.is_participating) if not editable and event.website_published else None

div.class: css_non_editable_mode_hidden o_not_editable bg-info-light border border-info border-bottom-0 rounded-top p-2

t.t-value: 'o_wevent_event_main_cover overflow-hidden ' + ('css_non_editable_mode_hidden border border-info rounded-bottom' if edition_cover_only else 'd-none' if opt_event_description_cover_hidden else 'rounded')

aside.t-if: opt_event_registration_block or opt_event_dates_block or opt_event_calendar_block or opt_event_location_block or opt_event_organizer_block or opt_event_share_block
aside.t-attf-class: col-lg-4 py-3 pb-lg-0 d-print-none {{'sticky-top align-self-start' if opt_event_fixed_sidebar else ''}}

div.p: Find out what people see and say about this event, and join the conversation.

div.class: container d-flex d-lg-none align-items-center py-3 pb-lg-2

nav.class: d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2 flex-grow-1

li.t-attf-class: breadcrumb-item active #{'fw-bold' if not event.header_visible else ''}

t.t-nocache: The number of products is dynamic, this rendering cannot be cached.
The number of products is dynamic, this rendering cannot be cached.

section.class: s_banner oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center pt72 o_cc o_colored_level o_bg_img_origin_border_box o_cc5 pb256 o_full_screen_height

div.div: Escape the screen, dive into the wild, and find your inner explorer.

section.class: s_text_image o_cc o_cc2 pb64 pt64 o_colored_level

div.div: Our summer camps are designed to create unforgettable experiences for children of all ages. Whether it’s their first time away from home or their fifth year with us, every camper is welcomed like family.
We focus on confidence-building, creativity, nature immersion, and friendship—all in a safe, supervised, and joy-filled environment.

section.class: s_three_columns o_cc o_colored_level o_cc1 pt112 pb0

div.class: s_card o_card_img_top card h-100 o_cc o_cc1 my-0 o_colored_level

div.div: Hikes, survival skills, kayaking, and nature games in a beautiful setting.

div.class: s_card o_card_img_top card h-100 o_cc o_cc1 my-0 o_colored_level

div.div: Painting, theater, crafts, and music, all at your child's fingertips.

div.class: s_card o_card_img_top card h-100 o_cc o_cc1 my-0 o_colored_level

div.p: Your choice of sports between football, basketball and windsurfing

section.class: s_call_to_action o_cc o_cc2 pt152 pb152 o_colored_level

div.h3:
2,000 campers
have enjoyed our summer camp.
div.p: Trust us with your children and enjoy your summer with peace of mind

t.t-nocache: Each user is different regardless of the page visited.

span.t-esc: user_id.name[:23] + '...' if user_id.name and len(user_id.name) > 25 else user_id.name

t.t-nocache: Each user is different regardless of the page visited.

i.class: fa fa-1x fa-fw fa-user me-2 o_editable_media

span.t-esc: user_id.name[:23] + '...' if user_id.name and len(user_id.name) > 25 else user_id.name

section.class: o_wevent_index_topbar_filters d-flex d-print-none align-items-center justify-content-lg-end flex-wrap gap-2 mt-4 mb-3

div.t-if: category.is_published and category.tag_ids and any(tag.color for tag in category.tag_ids)

span.t-attf-class: post_link cursor-pointer dropdown-item d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between #{'active' if not searched_category_tags else ''}
post_link cursor-pointer dropdown-item d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between #{'active' if tag in search_tags else ''}

button.class: o_not_editable btn btn-light position-relative ms-2 d-lg-none

div.class: o_website_offcanvas offcanvas offcanvas-end d-lg-none p-0 overflow-visible

t.t-if: category.is_published and category.tag_ids and any(tag.color for tag in category.tag_ids)

div.t-attf-class: o_record_cover_container d-flex flex-column h-100 o_colored_level o_cc #{_cp.get('background_color_class')} #{use_size and _cp.get('resize_class')} #{use_text_align and _cp.get('text_align_class')} #{additionnal_classes}
